title: New York Disability Analyst Rates (PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27; Authoritative examiner classes)
description: New York DDS Disability Analyst series with verified Salary Grade (SG) assignments and salary figures: Disability Analyst 2 (title 6884200, SG 20, PEF), Disability Analyst 3 (6884300, SG 23, PEF), Disability Analyst 4 (6884400, SG 25, PEF), and the supervisory Disability Analyst 5 (6884500, SG 62, Management/Confidential). SG assignments are from the official NY Title and Salary Listing (Open Data NY t3vp-5tka); examiner dollar figures (Hiring/Job rate) are from the official OER PS&T salary schedule eff 2025-03-27 (Admin). The DA-5 (SG 62, M/C) supervisor row uses the M/C M-1 band as a documented candidate (schedule-row crosswalk flagged unverified). Corrects prior notes: the current NY plan has no 'Disability Analyst 1' or 'Trainee'.

columns.name: classes.<class>.salary_grade
columns.description: NY Salary Grade (SG), verified from the Title and Salary Listing.

source.publisher: NY Office of Employee Relations (OER) / NY Dept of Civil Service / PEF; NY Office of Temporary and Disability Assistance (OTDA) Division of Disability Determinations
source.title: PS&T Unit Salary Schedule (eff 2025-03-27 Admin) + NY Title and Salary Listing (Open Data NY t3vp-5tka)

notes: Authoritative for the PEF examiner classes (Disability Analyst 2/3/4 = SG 20/23/25): SG assignments verified from the official NY Title and Salary Listing and Hiring/Job-rate dollar figures from the official OER PS&T schedule eff 2025-03-27 (3% / 103% factor per the 2023-2026 PEF CBA). The Disability Analyst 5 supervisor (SG 62, Management/Confidential) sits on the M/C schedule, not PS&T; SG 62 maps to the M/C 'M-1' band ($93,659/$118,388 eff 2025-04) per NY convention but an explicit published SG-62-to-M-1 crosswalk was not located, so supervisor_schedule_row_verified is false (candidate figures recorded). Corrects prior 'Trainee/Analyst 1' guess — no such current titles.
